skills.name: boolean_query_generator
skills.description: Transforms high-level job descriptions into complex logical search strings for Djinni, LinkedIn, and Google X-ray searches.

skills.name: linkedin_profile_parser
skills.description: Scrapes and structures LinkedIn public search results, extracting experience, titles, and certifications.

skills.name: djinni_api_sourcing
skills.description: Searches Djinni platform profiles, matching candidate salaries and tech stacks.

skills.name: resume_funnel_filter
